theme_strategy: Forced Deep Black / Cyberpunk CRT Terminal. No pure white backgrounds allowed. Uses dark voids with high-saturation neon accents.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ font-display tracking-tighter uppercase font-black
hierarchy.caption: text-xs font-monospace uppercase tracking-[0.2em]

visual_enhancers.crt_effects: MANDATORY: Global pointer-events-none overlay for scanlines (repeating-linear-gradient) and subtle grain/noise. Chromatic aberration text-shadow on scroll/hover.
visual_enhancers.glitch_hover: Hovering interactive elements triggers a brief CSS/Framer motion horizontal glitch offset with magenta/cyan shadows.
visual_enhancers.custom_cursor: Replace default cursor with a custom block or crosshair (mix-blend-mode: difference or neon green border).
visual_enhancers.parallax_horizon: Use Framer Motion or CSS perspective to create a glowing synthwave grid on the hero section background.
visual_enhancers.animations: Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. Framer Motion for line-by-line decrypting text reveals, typewriter effects (hero boot sequence), and power-meter bars loading.

layout_strategy.Hero: Full-screen terminal boot sequence. Typewriter effect for commands ('> whoami', '> load_portfolio.exe'). Blinking block cursor. Masked line-by-line reveal of massive kinetic headline. CRT flicker on load.
layout_strategy.About: Styled as a terminal dossier / 'cat about.txt'. First-person origin story. Numbered manifesto chapters (01, 02) using massive 'Unbounded' typography offset against monospace body text.
layout_strategy.Skills: Interactive console panel. Use green loading bars / 'power meters' for skill tiers. Hovering tools reveals stats/usage details. High-density, raw UI look.
layout_strategy.Showcase: Categorized as SECTOR_01, SECTOR_02. Large anchor pieces using placeholder images (styled as 'signal loading' or 'in transmission'). Use framer-motion for scroll-triggered image unmasking. Horizontal editorial marquee between sectors.
layout_strategy.Contact: Form styled purely as a terminal command line interface. Inputs look like terminal prompts (e.g., 'Email > _'). Social links as square terminal buttons. 'Status: available' glowing indicator.

components_and_libraries.shadcn_customization: Heavily modify any Shadcn components (like forms/inputs) to remove default Vercel-like borders. Use sharp corners (rounded-none), 1px solid #132b1a borders, and neon green text on focus.
components_and_libraries.form: Custom terminal-styled form pushing to MongoDB + Resend (as per brief). Hide standard labels, use inline terminal prompts.

showcase_placeholders.description: Premium, highly intentional cyberpunk / neon / Indian street photography placeholders for work sectors.

glitch_textures.description: Abstract CRT glitch elements to be used for masking, hover states, or background noise overlays.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use generic soft gradients. Use hard lines and solid void blacks.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
For this CRT design, use sharp square borders (rounded-none). Completely avoid rounded SaaS buttons.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles - in this case, sharp terminal blocks with inverse hover states and glitch effects.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like robot/brain for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on provided image URLs. NEVER use placeholder text for images.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
Share the guideline for .js files not for .tsx files as this is a JS project.
DO NOT use complete `transparent` background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it. Example: Dropdown with transparent background.
